description: Syncs files between lakehouses (or local-to-remote with --local). Compares by ETag (default) or Content-MD5 (--checksum). Only copies new/modified files.
notes: Use --delete to remove files at destination not present at source. Use --checksum for Content-MD5 comparison (slower, requires HEAD per file). Use --local /path/to/dir for local-to-remote sync. Rename detection uses atomic DFS rename (O(1) metadata op). Use --itemize for per-file action logging on stderr.

query_examples.description: Count of files deleted at destination.
Count of files detected as renamed (atomic rename).

query_examples.query: data.{new: copied, removed: deleted, unchanged: skipped}
